summary: TTS | App announces Done button when navigated
description:
GIVEN TTS is enabled
AND the user is on the Favorite Team page

steps.action: WHEN a user navigated to the "Done" button
steps.result: THEN the app should say 'Press select to confirm your choice of {favorite_team}. Press or scroll left to go to navigate to the "Cancel" button. Press right to go back to select another team'
